article_title: Issuance of Licenses and Certificates to Manufacturers, Transporters, and Dealers
text: It is unlawful and a violation of this code to sell a low-speed vehicle, as defined in Section 385.5, without disclosing to the buyer the vehicle’s maximum speed and the potential risks of driving a low-speed vehicle.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 4. Manufacturers, Transporters, Dealers, and Salesmen [11700 - 11909]
#### Article 1. Issuance of Licenses and Certificates to Manufacturers, Transporters, and Dealers [11700 - 11740]
##### § 11713.10

It is unlawful and a violation of this code to sell a low-speed vehicle, as defined in Section 385.5, without disclosing to the buyer the vehicle’s maximum speed and the potential risks of driving a low-speed vehicle.

*(Added by Stats. 1999, Ch. 140, Sec. 3. Effective January 1, 2000.)*

subsections.text: It is unlawful and a violation of this code to sell a low-speed vehicle, as defined in Section 385.5, without disclosing to the buyer the vehicle’s maximum speed and the potential risks of driving a low-speed vehicle.
